zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas of Woodstock於1355年1月7日出生在英國奧可福爾武德斯托可時，他的父親Edward III King of England42歲，母親Philippa de Hainault Queen of England41歲。他於1374年8月24日之前與Eleanor de Bohun在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1341年登記服兵役。他去世於1397年9月9日在法國帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年42歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas of Woodstock于1355年1月7日出生在英国奧可福爾武德斯托可时，他的父亲Edward III King of England42岁，母亲Philippa de Hainault Queen of England41岁。他于1374年8月24日之前与Eleanor de Bohun在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1341年登记服兵役。他去世于1397年9月9日在法国帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年42岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Woodstock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Hertfordshire): habitational name from Woodstock in Oxfordshire, or Woodstock in Tunstall (Kent). The placenames derive from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + stoc ‘place’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas of Woodstock was born on 7 January 1355, in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Edward III King of England, was 42 and his mother, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, was 41. He married Eleanor de Bohun before 24 August 1374, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1341. He died on 9 September 1397, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas of Woodstock est né le 7 janvier 1355, à Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward III King of England, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Bohun avant 24 août 1374, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1341. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1397, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

Januar 1355 in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward III King of England 42 und seine Mutter Philippa de Hainault Queen of England 41. Er hat vor 24. August 1374 in England Eleanor de Bohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1341 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. September 1397 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas of Woodstock è nato il il 7 gennaio 1355 nel Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Edward III King of England, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Bohun prima del 24 agosto 1374, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1341. Morì il 9 settembre 1397, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas of Woodstockが1355年1月7日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウッドストックで生まれた時，父Edward III King of Englandは42歳，母Philippa de Hainault Queen of Englandは41歳であった。1374年8月24日以前にイギリスでEleanor de Bohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1341年に兵役登録をした。彼は1397年9月9日にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで42歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas of Woodstock(이)가 1355년 1월 7일 영국 스퍼드실르 우드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward III King of England(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Hainault Queen of England(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1374년 8월 24일 이전 영국에서 Eleanor de Bohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1397년 9월 9일 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.7 January 1355–9 September 1397: 7 de janeiro de 1355–9 de setembro de 1397
pt.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas of Woodstock nasceu em 7 de janeiro de 1355, em Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward III King of England, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Bohun antes 24 de agosto de 1374, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1341. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1397, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: ерк минстир, ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas of Woodstock родился 7 января 1355 г. в местности вудстокк, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward III King of England было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Bohun перед 24 августа 1374 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1341 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 сентября 1397 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.7 January 1355–9 September 1397: 7 de enero de 1355–9 de septiembre de 1397
es.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas of Woodstock nació el 7 de enero de 1355, en Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward III King of England, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Bohun antes de 24 de agosto de 1374, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1341. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1397, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
